title: Phemex - Rekt
relevance_summary: Multi-chain access control breach leading to hot wallet drain across numerous blockchains

prevention.rule: Block any tx that accesses multiple hot wallets across different blockchains within a short timeframe

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that accesses multiple hot wallets across different blockchains within a short timeframe
summary: Phemex suffered a multi-chain access control breach, draining over $73.54 million from their hot wallets across 30 different blockchains. A critical prevention measure would be to block transactions accessing multiple hot wallets rapidly.
